title: Bitcoin gets a green light from a reliable momentum gauge. Here are key levels to watch
summary: A smoother long-term MACD just flipped bullish, pointing to more upside. Here are key levels that will decide if the ongoing bounce turns into a full blown uptrend.

title: Live markets: Bitcoin tops $64,000 as selling pressure on Coinbase eases
summary: Spot bitcoin funds lost about $95 million on Thursday and ether funds roughly $52 million, ending the one bright spot in crypto's institutional flows even as prices rallied.

title: XRP up 2% as buyers push through $1.10 resistance
summary: A late-session volume surge carried XRP above its recent range, with traders now watching whether $1.10 can hold as support.

title: Bitcoin's quiet split: Strong in USD, lagging in JPY as Yen rises on intervention fears
summary: A sharp rise in the yen has left bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies underperforming in yen terms compared with their dollar-based trading pairs.

title: Bitcoin zips higher to nearly $64,000 as chip rally and yen strength drive gains
summary: Bitcoin is up 4.2% over seven days that contained an oil shock, a bond selloff and two rounds of U.S. strikes on Iran.
